_comment: Easterling Vanguard (LTR, {1}{B} creature — Human Warrior, 2/1): 'When this creature dies, amass Orcs 1.' Flow: declare Easterling Vanguard as an attacker; the Opponent blocks with their Grizzly Bears (2/2). Vanguard (2/1) takes 2 and dies -> its dies trigger amasses Orcs 1, creating a 0/0 black Orc Army token under your control with a +1/+1 counter (a 1/1 Orc Army). Alternatively kill the Vanguard any other way to see the amass. (Combat needs an opponent willing to block — the AI opponent or manual play.)
